clinical_findings: sintomas B (fiebre, sudoracion nocturna, perdida de peso)

patient_reported_concerns: le aparecieron ganglios en muchos lados
subjective_data.onset_pattern: evolucion variable. Sintomas B definen pronostico.

imaging_location.body_region: cuerpo entero (cervical, axilar, mediastinal, abdominal, inguinal)
imaging_location.anatomical_landmarks: cadenas ganglionares, bazo, higado, medula osea
imaging_location.positioning_notes: PET-TC es estandar para staging. TC con contraste para mediciones. Biopsia excisional > PAAF para diagnostico.

radiologist_guidance.expected_imaging_findings: Adenopatias coalescentes en multiples territorios. Captacion intensa en PET. Esplenomegalia con compromiso difuso o focal. Compromiso medular.
radiologist_guidance.meddiffusion_prompt: PET CT whole body, multiple FDG-avid lymph nodes cervical axillary mediastinal, splenomegaly, lymphoma staging, clinical medical imaging
radiologist_guidance.meddiffusion_negative_prompt: single isolated lymph node, normal study, reactive small nodes
radiologist_guidance.image_generation_notes: Adenopatias multiples avidas en PET. Compromiso multi-territorio caracteristico.

notes: Biopsia ganglionar excisional confirma subtipo. PET-TC estadifica.
